name: Ncapriata Di Fave (Fava Bean Puree with Greens)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans and remove them from their skins. If the skins cling too tightly, boil them for 5 to 10 minutes and then peel.
2. Place the peeled beans in a pot with celery and onion. Add enough water to cover, bring to a simmer, and cook for 20 to 25 minutes or until the beans are very soft. Add more water if necessary.
3. Drain and transfer the beans to a food processor. Add the 2 tbsp olive oil.
4. Clean the broccoli rabe by removing any thick skin covering the larger stems and cutting into 2-inch pieces. Rinse the greens well.
5. Bring water to a boil, add the greens and 1 tbsp salt, cover, and cook until the greens are soft but not mushy, about 5 minutes. Drain.
6. Warm the 3 tbsp olive oil in a skillet and slowly sauté the garlic until it is golden brown and soft. Do not let it brown. Add the greens and swirl them around in the flavorful oil.
7. Serve on a platter, spooning the garlic-infused greens over the fava beans.
